name: Jesnita
overview: Jesnita is a drama directed by Emi Suffian, produced by Zeel Production. Starring Intan Najuwa, Yusuf Bahrin, Malek Mccrone, Fikry Ibrahim, Nasha Aziz and many more. This series begins its premiere on Slot Tiara, Astro Prima starting November 7, 2022 to replace Takdir Cinta Dhia which ended its broadcast on November 4, 2022 on the official website
